assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: Feature request: PDF export for board

assignments.name: body
assignments.value:
Hi team,

please add an export to PDF for the kanban board. This is important for our weekly reports.
Priority is medium, deadline ideally end of July 2026.

Thanks,
Anna

parameters.text:
=You parse stakeholder emails into Kanban ticket fields for Join-Issue Collector.

Return ONLY valid JSON with these keys:
- title (string, max 80 chars)
- description (string)
- category: exactly "User Story" or "Technical Task"
- priority: exactly "HighPriority", "MidPriority", or "LowPriority"
- dueDate: "YYYY-MM-DD" or empty string
- creatorName (string: first and last name from the email signature or sender display name, never an email address)

Email from: {{ $json.from }}
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Body:
{{ $json.body }}

nodes.name: Create task in Triage
nodes.notes: POST to Firebase Cloud Function via Hosting rewrite
